mapper.select: SELECT staff_no FROM ihr_employee_exclusion WHERE exclusion_type = #{exclusionType} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND staff_no IS NOT NULL AND staff_no != ''
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ihr_employee_exclusion (id, staff_name, staff_no, exclusion_type, status, reason, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.staffName}, #{item.staffNo}, #{item.exclusionType}, #{item.status}, #{item.reason}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, 0)
